vplanet_inference

Case Studies

End-to-end science applications of vplanet_inference on real research problems. Each case study is available as a downloadable Jupyter notebook.

#

Notebook

Description

4

Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Earth Interior Evolution ↓

Recover Earth’s interior initial conditions from present-day geophysical observations using maximum likelihood estimation (MLE). Covers VPLanet’s thermint and radheat modules, Gaussian log-likelihood construction, single and multi-start Nelder-Mead optimization, local sensitivity analysis, and Fisher information matrix computation. Based on Gilbert-Janizek et al. (2026).
